S2_FAMILY_MESH_KEY.description: Required for true AES encryption of the family mesh blind relay.

S2_LLM_API_KEY.description: API token for connecting to the S2-SWM LLM to process natural language (optional, falls back to local rules).

network.justification: Outbound access strictly limited to fetching LLM generations via S2_LLM_API_KEY and broadcasting AES-encrypted blobs to the blind relay server.
